docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-21-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARADAT, PHIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,668.48 FILED BY BURROWS, SIDNEY AS TO DEFENDANT BARADAT, PHIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-01-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-01-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURROWS, SIDNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARADAT, PHIL $1,574.15 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,624.15, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS $2075.00, AND THAT ACCURED INTEREST TOTALED $899.15. THIS IS REDUCED BY $1400.00 FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO PROVIDE 30 DAY NOTICE OF HIS INTENTION TO VACATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
